creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: tinderbox.freebsd.org at this point is quite stale (last build is from 2014) but it is still the first hit in Google for "freebsd tinderbox".  While the Jenkins tinderbox may not fully replicate the old one, it is at least doing builds, so I think we should redirect tinderbox.freebsd.org to ci.freebsd.org/tinderbox
